expression.expression: CASE WHEN contains(coalesce(lower(Concat_RecordID), ''), coalesce(lower(Concat_RecordID_lag1), '')) THEN Concat_RecordID_lag1 WHEN contains(coalesce(lower(Concat_RecordID), ''), coalesce(lower(Concat_RecordID_lead1), '')) THEN Concat_RecordID_lead1 ELSE Concat_RecordID END
aggregate(_rules, `org_name_adj`, (acc, rule) -> regexp_replace(acc, concat('^', rule['org_name_adj2'], '$'), rule['max_org_name_adj']))

condition.expression: ((NOT (CAST(org_name_adj AS string) IN ('Hospital', 'Institute', 'Clinic', 'Department', 'The', 'University', 'Centre', 'Center', 'Inc', 'Llc', 'Ltd', 'Corp', 'Corporation', 'College'))) OR (org_name_adj IS NULL))

expression.expression: (LAG(Concat_RecordID, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY prophecy_row_id NULLS FIRST))
(LEAD(Concat_RecordID, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY prophecy_row_id NULLS FIRST))
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((org_name_adj IS NULL) OR (CAST(org_name_adj AS string) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))
collect_list(struct(org_name_adj2 AS org_name_adj2, max_org_name_adj AS max_org_name_adj))
